GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [o_orderpriority@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[o_orderpriority@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[o_orderpriority@0 as o_orderpriority, count(*)@1 as order_count]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[o_orderpriority], aggr=[count(*)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_orderpriority@0], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[o_orderpriority], aggr=[count(*)]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
                GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=LeftSemi, on=[(o_orderkey@0, l_orderkey@0)], projection=[1]
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
                        GpuFilterExec: predicate=o_orderdate@1 >= 1993-07-01 AND o_orderdate@1 < 1993-10-01, projection=[0, 2]
                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=25565281
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
                        GpuFilterExec: predicate=l_receiptdate@2 > l_commitdate@1, projection=[0]
                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=25565281
--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=1152
